category_title: Preschool girls performing 'sassy girl' personas through relational and physical aggression
scenario_title: Physical aggression and covert defiance on the playground
minimal_context: Kiara is engaging in physical play with a large plastic bat on the playground with her peers.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Kiara, I see you chasing the boys with that large plastic bat. I hope you're not actually hitting people.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Walks with her head down toward the teacher)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You're not actually hitting people with the bat, are you? You need to put it away.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Walks over to the toy bin with the bat over her head and throws the bat into the bin) I don’t want to go in our castle. Come on Kim Bear ... let’s go.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, just make sure you are playing nicely with the others.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Walks quickly back, swinging hands aggressively) You can’t get it. (Walks over to the edge of the sidewalk, holding hands up on either side of face, wiggling them in a taunting manner) AHHHH HAAAA. (Walks up to Mary and pulls her arm down forcefully)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Kiara, I see you chasing the boys with that large plastic bat. I hope you're not actually hitting people.

STUDENT: (Walks with her head down toward the teacher)

TUTOR: You're not actually hitting people with the bat, are you? You need to put it away.

STUDENT: (Walks over to the toy bin with the bat over her head and throws the bat into the bin) I don’t want to go in our castle. Come on Kim Bear ... let’s go.

TUTOR: Okay, just make sure you are playing nicely with the others.

STUDENT: (Walks quickly back, swinging hands aggressively) You can’t get it. (Walks over to the edge of the sidewalk, holding hands up on either side of face, wiggling them in a taunting manner) AHHHH HAAAA. (Walks up to Mary and pulls her arm down forcefully)

task.content: Engaging in physical play, chasing, and mock fighting on the playground

context.social_setting: Interacting with male and female peers (Bill, Mary, Kim Bear) and the researcher

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: After being confronted by the teacher for hitting a peer (Bill) with a large plastic bat
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Walks to the toy bin with the bat over her head, throws the bat into the bin, walks quickly back to the camera swinging hands aggressively at the researcher, taunts with hands on face, and covertly pulls a younger peer's arm down forcefully
related_quotes: I don’t want to go in our castle. Come on Kim Bear ... let’s go.

behavior_patterns.condition: Prior to teacher intervention during playground free play
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Chasing boys, engaging in mock fighting, and teasing and hitting other male and female children with a large plastic bat

behavior_patterns.condition: When the teacher initially calls out 'I hope you're not actually hitting people'
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Walks with her head down toward the teacher
